title: Procedures for Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Procedures for Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres in Canada
- Find a Vaccination Centre
- Rapid Risk Assessment
- FAQ for Health Care Sites

### Notice: To serve you better, we’re updating the Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre Designation application form system starting on June 8.
The forms for the submission of designation applications, renewals, notification of changes and order requests may be unavailable on June 8 and 9.
We apologize for any inconvenience.

## Forms: Yellow Fever Vaccination Centres in Canada
To apply to become a Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre:
Application and Attestation form
* A copy of the Nominated Health Care Practitioner's current license to practice is required when submitting the application.
To notify us of changes to an existing Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre or Nominated Health Care Practitioner:
Notification of changes and Attestation form
* A copy of the Nominated Health Care Practitioner's current license to practice is required when submitting the application.
To order copies of the International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis , or the Certificate of Medical Contraindication to Vaccination :
To terminate the designation of a Yellow Fever Vaccination Centre:
Voluntary termination of designation form
Please return by mail all certificates and stamps issued by the Public Health Agency of Canada.
